free_text: The Al-27(d,a)Mg-25 and F-19(d,a)O-17 reactions and the
2I+1 rule.
A semiconductor detector was used.
The target was prepared by vacuum evaporation of
calcium fluoride onto a 0.2 mg/cm2 gold foil. The
thickness of the calcium fluoride was approximately
40 keV at 2.5 MeV based on energy resolution of the
observed alpha particles. This thickness is estimated
to be correct to within 50%.
